description: You are a robotics demonstration engineer preparing a Webots simulation for a trade show booth (TechExpo 2024). Configure the scene's visualization and metadata settings for a professional demonstration. Set the WorldInfo title to "Robot Navigation Demo - TechExpo 2024". Configure the Viewpoint to an overhead bird's-eye view with position (0, 0, 3.0) and a fieldOfView of 1.2 radians. Update the Background skyColor to a dark navy blue (0.05, 0.05, 0.2). Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/demo_configured.wbt.
